# The Evil Dead 2

Pacing: Continuous (../Pacing%20types/Continuous%20e187a8c9a0cf44aea652648d5970a0db.md)

<aside>
💡 Technically, this does not meet [Extended, fresh continuity](../../Data/Restrictions/Extended,%20fresh%20continuity%202e8c934529774ca3bb236738110e73cf.md) in that it is not that long of a storyline, but it achieves the other two aspects so well, and in a way that could potentially continue on, and which the series does accomplish.

</aside>
